title: Battle of Bothawui (disambiguation)
content:
'''Battle of Bothawui''' may refer to:

==Canon==
*[[Battle of Bothawui]] ([[22 BBY]]), a battle near [[Bothawui]] during the [[Clone Wars]].

==Legends==
*[[First Battle of Bothawui]] ([[3671 BBY]]), the first battle over [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]] during the [[Great Galactic War]].
*[[Battle of Bothawui (Second; Great Galactic War)|Second battle of Bothawui]] (3671 BBY), the second attempt at an invasion of Bothawui during the [[Great Galactic War]].
*[[Battle of Bothawui/Legends|Battle of Bothawui]] ([[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]), a battle near Bothawui during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].
*[[Battle of Bothawui (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Bothawui]] ([[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]]), one of the two concurrent final battles of the [[Galactic Civil War]] and subsequently the first of the [[Caamas Document Crisis]].
*[[Battle of Bothawui (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Bothawui]] ([[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]), a battle above Bothawui during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].

{{Disambig}}

{{Interlang
|de=Schlacht von Bothawui#kanon
|pl=Bitwa o Bothawui (strona ujednoznaczniająca)
}}
